summary: Plan-only classification: the hinted representative #74380 is already closed, so it should not be treated as the live canonical. The remaining work splits into two live paths: #57555 is the canonical summarize installer/feedback issue, while #87985 with PR #87986 tracks the separate model-usage Linux eligibility issue. Closed PR #74408 remains useful historical evidence but is closed unmerged and should not receive a closure or merge action.

actions.reason: #57555 is the best live canonical for the summarize installer source and enable-failure feedback decision after #74380 was closed.
